warnings: The sum of Fukui plus (f+): 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
The sum of Fukui minus (f−): 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose: The Fukui reactivity indices at the DFT level (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1) were computed for acrolein. The calculated total reactivity index value is approximately 11.5432 (units depend on the definition used in the calculation). The calculation used the chemkit engine with the specified method, functional, and basis set, and the input molecule from the given xyz file.
